title: Blackened Netherite
description: Blackened Netherite gives your armor, tools, and blocks a deeper black style; simple, clean, and just cooler.
body:
![Blackened Netherite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6384906fb50b63303fd4343b790aeede5066c72.png)
# ⚫ Blackened Netherite

**Blackened Netherite** or **Black Netherite** gives Minecraft’s toughest material an even darker identity.
Every netherite tool, block, and piece of armor now carries a bold black finish for a more menacing look 😨

---

## 🔍 What’s Inside

* ⚔️ Armor and weapons retextured with a pitch-black style
* 🪓 Tools and blocks refined into a deeper, shadowy tone
* 🎨 Subtle yet powerful visual tweak

---

![Blackened Netherite Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/tx1NSDkr/images/c9d56a1ebac831113ee486e8e574d06f6ff46fc7.png)

---

## 🛠️ Installation

1. Download the `.zip` file.
2. Open Minecraft → **Options → Resource Packs** → **Open Pack Folder**.
3. Move the `.zip` into the `resourcepacks` folder.
4. Select *Blackened Netherite* in-game and click **Done**.

---

Step into battle with the darkest version of Netherite. 🖤
